creator: g.fischer@r-a-c.de
text:
Hi,

I ran into the same problem with an s822. I tried 12, 13 and 14. Both big and little endian versions. All of them couldn't boot and exited immediately with the "no operating system installed" message.
I booted from SMS the regular way and like Calvin I'm using a VIOS. I didn't try a bare metal installation since that would be of no use to me.
From version 12 I also tried the memstick image but that exited the exact same way.
